member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelEyeProtocol
member.summary: Provides packet builders and helpers for the ANGEL EYE II-EX serial protocol.

member.name: F:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelEyeProtocol.SourceName
member.summary: Bridge source name used in local payloads and logs.

member.name: F:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelEyeProtocol.LockType
member.summary: Operation type used by the lock and unlock command.

member.name: F:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelEyeProtocol.ErrorCancelType
member.summary: Operation type used by the error cancellation command.

member.name: F:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelEyeProtocol.GameProcessConfirmationType
member.summary: Operation type used by the game process confirmation command.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelEyeProtocol.BuildLockCommand(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Builds the serial command that asks the shoe to enter or leave lock mode.
member.param: True to lock the shoe; false to unlock it.
member.returns: The complete packet bytes including STX, ETX, and BCC.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelEyeProtocol.BuildCancelErrorCommand(System.String)
member.summary: Builds the serial command that asks the shoe to clear a specific error code.
member.param: Two-digit error clear data from 00 through 99.
member.returns: The complete packet bytes including STX, ETX, and BCC.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelEyeProtocol.BuildGameProcessConfirmationCommand
member.summary: Builds the serial command that asks the shoe to confirm the current game process.
member.returns: The complete packet bytes including STX, ETX, and BCC.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelEyeProtocol.BuildOperationCommand(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a generic operation command packet for the ANGEL EYE II-EX host interface.
member.returns: The complete packet bytes including STX, ETX, and BCC.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelEyeProtocol.NormalizeTwoDigitData(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a one- or two-digit operation data value to the two-character protocol form.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelEyeProtocol.CalculateCommandBcc(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Calculates the BCC used by outbound command packets.
member.param: Packet bytes from STX through ETX.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelEyeProtocol.FormatHex(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Formats raw bytes as a space-separated uppercase hexadecimal string.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsApiClient
member.summary: Sends bridge events from the local SQLite outbox to the configured BMS event API.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsApiClient.OnLogReceived
member.summary: Raised when the dispatcher has a human-readable log message.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsApiClient.OnStatusChanged
member.summary: Raised when the API dispatcher status changes.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsApiClient.IsRunning
member.summary: Gets whether the background outbox dispatcher is running.
Starts the background dispatcher for pending events in the journal.
member.param: Local bridge event journal used as the outbox.
Optional predicate used to pause delivery for specific endpoints.
Optional provider that creates the heartbeat endpoint snapshot.
Optional handler for commands returned by BMS heartbeat responses.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsApiClient.StopAsync
member.summary: Stops the background dispatcher and waits for the current send cycle to finish.
member.returns: A task that completes after the dispatcher stops.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsApiClient.Dispose
member.summary: Stops the dispatcher and releases HTTP and synchronization resources.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsResponseEnvelope`1
member.summary: Wraps standard BMS API responses.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsResponseEnvelope`1.ErrCode
member.summary: BMS response error code; zero means success.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsResponseEnvelope`1.ErrMsg
member.summary: BMS response error message.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsResponseEnvelope`1.Data
member.summary: Response payload.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatRequest
member.summary: Heartbeat payload sent by the bridge to BMS for status reporting and command polling.
member.param: Stable bridge identifier, currently the Windows machine name.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus})
member.summary: Heartbeat payload sent by the bridge to BMS for status reporting and command polling.
member.param: Stable bridge identifier, currently the Windows machine name.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatRequest.BridgeId
member.summary: Stable bridge identifier, currently the Windows machine name.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatRequest.BridgeName
member.summary: Human-readable bridge name.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatRequest.Version
member.summary: Bridge application version.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatRequest.MachineName
member.summary: Windows machine name.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatRequest.SentAt
member.summary: Heartbeat send time.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatRequest.Endpoints
member.summary: Per-shoe endpoint status snapshots.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus
member.summary: Per-shoe status included in the heartbeat payload.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.DeskName
member.summary: Display desk name.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.SourceDataCode
member.summary: BMS source table code.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.SourceDataId
member.summary: BMS SourceData ID used for diagnostics.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.ShoeId
member.summary: Bridge-side shoe identifier.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.DeviceId
member.summary: Bridge-side physical or mock device identifier.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.ComPort
member.summary: Configured physical connection display value.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.ConnectionMode
member.summary: Configured endpoint connection mode.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.MoxaHost
member.summary: MOXA/NPort host when using direct TCP mode.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.MoxaPort
member.summary: MOXA/NPort TCP server port when using direct TCP mode.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.Enabled
member.summary: Whether this endpoint is enabled locally.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.BmsTransmitEnabled
member.summary: Whether events from this endpoint are currently transmitted to BMS.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.MockMode
member.summary: Whether this endpoint runs in mock mode.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.Status
member.summary: Current local connection status.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.Shoe
member.summary: Current BMS shoe number.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.Round
member.summary: Current BMS round number.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.RoundId
member.summary: Current bridge round identifier.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.PendingOutboxCount
member.summary: Pending local outbox event count.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.FailedOutboxCount
member.summary: Failed local outbox event count.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatEndpointStatus.LastEvent
member.summary: Last visible endpoint event text.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatResponse
member.summary: Heartbeat response returned by BMS.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatResponse.Accepted
member.summary: Whether BMS accepted the heartbeat.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatResponse.Message
member.summary: BMS response message.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatResponse.ServerTime
member.summary: BMS server time.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatResponse.Commands
member.summary: Commands BMS wants the bridge to handle after the heartbeat.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatResponse.NextPollSeconds
member.summary: Recommended seconds before the next recovery poll.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeHeartbeatResponse.RateLimited
member.summary: Whether BMS intentionally throttled this polling request.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeCommand
member.summary: Command returned by BMS in a heartbeat response.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeCommand.CommandId
member.summary: BMS command identifier used for logs and deduplication.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeCommand.Type
member.summary: Command type, for example RecoverRound or ResendEvent.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeCommand.SourceDataCode
member.summary: BMS source table code for the target shoe endpoint.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeCommand.DeviceId
member.summary: Bridge-side shoe device identifier.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeCommand.EventId
member.summary: Bridge local event ID for ResendEvent commands.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeCommand.EventType
member.summary: Optional event type filter for ResendEvent commands.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeCommand.Shoe
member.summary: BMS shoe number for recovery or resend lookup.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeCommand.Round
member.summary: BMS round number for recovery or resend lookup.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.AngelBridgeCommand.RoundId
member.summary: Bridge round identifier for recovery or resend lookup.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeCommandHandlingResult
member.summary: Result of handling a BMS command returned by heartbeat polling.
member.param: Whether the command was accepted and handled locally.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeCommandHandlingResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Result of handling a BMS command returned by heartbeat polling.
member.param: Whether the command was accepted and handled locally.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeCommandHandlingResult.Success
member.summary: Whether the command was accepted and handled locally.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeCommandHandlingResult.Status
member.summary: Machine-readable result status.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeCommandHandlingResult.Message
member.summary: Human-readable result detail.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeCommandHandlingResult.Handled(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a handled result.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeCommandHandlingResult.NotFound(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a not-found result.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeCommandHandlingResult.Rejected(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a rejected result.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsApiSettings
member.summary: Configures the BMS event API endpoint and bearer token used by the bridge.
member.param: Bearer token sent with each request.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsApiSettings.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Configures the BMS event API endpoint and bearer token used by the bridge.
member.param: Bearer token sent with each request.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsApiSettings.Url
member.summary: Target BMS event API URL.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsApiSettings.Token
member.summary: Bearer token sent with each request.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BmsApiSettings.Empty
member.summary: An empty API configuration.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSendResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a single event API POST attempt.
member.param: True when BMS accepted the event.
HTTP status code if a response was received.
Failure detail used for retry logging.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSendResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String)
member.summary: Represents the result of a single event API POST attempt.
member.param: True when BMS accepted the event.
HTTP status code if a response was received.
Failure detail used for retry logging.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSendResult.Success
member.summary: True when BMS accepted the event.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSendResult.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code if a response was received.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSendResult.Error
member.summary: Failure detail used for retry logging.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSendResult.Ok(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a successful send result.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSendResult.Failed(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a failed send result.
member.param: HTTP status code, or null when no response was received.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventJournal
member.summary: Maintains the local SQLite event journal and retry outbox for bridge-to-BMS delivery.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventJournal.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates or opens a bridge event journal.
member.param: Optional SQLite database path; defaults to the application folder.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventJournal.DbPath
member.summary: SQLite database path used by this journal.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventJournal.AppendAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Appends an event payload and assigns the next local event ID.
member.param: Mutable event payload that receives the generated eventId.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventJournal.GetDueOutboxEventsAsync(System.Int32,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Reads pending or retry-due events for API delivery.
member.param: Maximum number of events to return.
Current UTC time used for retry scheduling.
member.returns: Pending events ordered by event ID.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventJournal.GetOutboxStatusAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reads delivery health for one endpoint's local outbox.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventJournal.MarkSentAsync(System.Int64,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Marks an outbox event as successfully delivered.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventJournal.MarkFailedAsync(System.Int64,System.Int32,System.DateTime,System.String)
member.summary: Marks an outbox delivery attempt as failed and schedules the next retry.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventJournal.RequeueEventAsync(System.Int64,System.DateTime,System.String)
member.summary: Requeues one stored event for delivery when BMS explicitly asks the bridge to resend it.
member.param: Current UTC time used as the retry due time.
Audit reason stored in the last-error field until the send succeeds.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventJournal.RequeueMatchingEventsAsync(AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventQuery,System.DateTime,System.String)
member.summary: Requeues stored events matching a recovery or resend query.
member.param: Filter and paging options; the newest matching rows are requeued first.
Current UTC time used as the retry due time.
Audit reason stored in the last-error field until the send succeeds.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventJournal.QueryPayloadJsonAsync(AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventQuery)
member.summary: Queries stored payload JSON values for diagnostics or replay.
member.returns: Payload JSON rows ordered by event ID.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgePendingEvent
member.summary: Represents one event waiting for BMS API delivery.
member.param: BMS source table code stored in the legacy desk column.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgePendingEvent.#ctor(System.Int64,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Represents one event waiting for BMS API delivery.
member.param: BMS source table code stored in the legacy desk column.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgePendingEvent.EventId
member.summary: Local event ID.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgePendingEvent.Type
member.summary: Bridge event type.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgePendingEvent.SourceDataCode
member.summary: BMS source table code stored in the legacy desk column.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgePendingEvent.DeviceId
member.summary: Bridge shoe device identifier.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgePendingEvent.Shoe
member.summary: BMS shoe number.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgePendingEvent.Round
member.summary: BMS round number.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgePendingEvent.PayloadJson
member.summary: Serialized event payload.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgePendingEvent.RetryCount
member.summary: Number of failed delivery attempts.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeOutboxStatus
member.summary: Summarizes local outbox delivery health for one endpoint.
member.param: Number of events not yet accepted by BMS.
Number of pending events with at least one failed send attempt.
Highest retry count among pending events.
Oldest failed attempt time among currently pending events.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeOutboxStatus.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String)
member.summary: Summarizes local outbox delivery health for one endpoint.
member.param: Number of events not yet accepted by BMS.
Number of pending events with at least one failed send attempt.
Highest retry count among pending events.
Oldest failed attempt time among currently pending events.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeOutboxStatus.PendingCount
member.summary: Number of events not yet accepted by BMS.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeOutboxStatus.FailedCount
member.summary: Number of pending events with at least one failed send attempt.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeOutboxStatus.MaxRetryCount
member.summary: Highest retry count among pending events.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeOutboxStatus.OldestFailedAttemptUtc
member.summary: Oldest failed attempt time among currently pending events.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeOutboxStatus.LastAttemptUtc
member.summary: Latest failed attempt time.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeOutboxStatus.LastError
member.summary: Latest delivery error detail.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeOutboxStatus.Empty
member.summary: Empty status with no pending events.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventQuery
member.summary: Filter options for reading stored bridge event payloads.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventQuery.Type
member.summary: Optional event type filter.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventQuery.SourceDataCode
member.summary: Optional BMS source table code filter.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventQuery.DeviceId
member.summary: Optional bridge shoe device identifier filter.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventQuery.Shoe
member.summary: Optional BMS shoe number filter.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventQuery.Round
member.summary: Optional BMS round number filter.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventQuery.RoundId
member.summary: Optional bridge round identifier filter.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventQuery.AfterId
member.summary: Only return events after this local event ID.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeEventQuery.Limit
member.summary: Maximum rows to return.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeGameNumbering
member.summary: Creates BMS shoe numbers in yyyyMMddNNNN format and advances them across day boundaries.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeGameNumbering.TodayFirstShoe
member.summary: Returns the first shoe number for the current local day.
member.returns: The shoe number ending in 0001 for today.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeGameNumbering.FirstShoeForDate(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Returns the first shoe number for a specific date.
member.param: The local date used for the yyyyMMdd prefix.
member.returns: The shoe number ending in 0001 for the given date.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeGameNumbering.NextShoe(System.Int64,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Advances the current shoe number, resetting to 0001 when the local date changes.
member.param: Optional local time used by tests or simulations.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings
member.summary: Stores persistent bridge settings in the local SQLite database.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.BmsUrl
member.summary: BMS event API URL.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.BmsToken
member.summary: Current JWT bearer token used for BMS API calls.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.JwtNameIdentifier
member.summary: JWT source provider identifier claim.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.JwtSerialNumber
member.summary: JWT source provider token serial number claim.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.JwtIssuer
member.summary: JWT issuer expected by BMS.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.JwtAudience
member.summary: JWT audience expected by BMS.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.JwtSigningKey
member.summary: Shared HS256 signing key used to create source provider tokens.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.JwtLifetimeMinutes
member.summary: Generated JWT lifetime in minutes.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.TotalBetTimeSeconds
member.summary: Default betting countdown seconds for new shoe endpoints.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.AllowPhysicalShoeCommands
member.summary: Whether the bridge may send OP commands to physical ANGEL shoes.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.ConnectionMode
member.summary: Physical input mode shared by every configured shoe endpoint.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.Shoes
member.summary: Configured local shoe endpoints.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.DatabasePath
member.summary: Path to the local SQLite database used by settings and event outbox tables.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.SettingsPath
member.summary: Legacy JSON settings path used only for one-time migration.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.Load
member.summary: Loads settings from SQLite, falling back to the legacy JSON file and default two-shoe mock layout.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings.Save
member.summary: Saves the settings JSON into the local SQLite settings table.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeConnectionMode
member.summary: Physical input transport used by an endpoint.

member.name: F:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeConnectionMode.ComPort
member.summary: Use a Windows serial COM port.

member.name: F:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeConnectionMode.MoxaTcp
member.summary: Connect directly to a MOXA/NPort TCP server endpoint.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeConnectionMode.Normalize(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a persisted connection mode value.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings
member.summary: Persistent configuration for one physical or mock ANGEL shoe endpoint.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.Enabled
member.summary: Whether this endpoint is active.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.BmsTransmitEnabled
member.summary: Whether events from this endpoint are allowed to be sent to BMS.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.DeskId
member.summary: Legacy BMS system desk GUID retained for old settings migration; not sent to BMS.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.DeskName
member.summary: Human-readable desk name shown in the bridge UI.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.SourceDataId
member.summary: Optional BMS SourceData GUID mapped to this endpoint for diagnostics.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.SourceDataCode
member.summary: Primary BMS source table code mapped to this endpoint.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.ShoeId
member.summary: Bridge-side shoe device identifier.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.CurrentShoe
member.summary: Current BMS shoe number.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.CurrentRound
member.summary: Current BMS round number within the shoe.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.CurrentRoundId
member.summary: Current bridge round identifier, when available.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.ComPort
member.summary: Serial port assigned to this endpoint.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.ConnectionMode
member.summary: Physical input mode: Windows COM port or direct MOXA TCP.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.MoxaHost
member.summary: MOXA/NPort IP address or host name when is MOXA TCP.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.MoxaPort
member.summary: MOXA/NPort TCP server port when is MOXA TCP.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.MockMode
member.summary: Whether this endpoint runs without physical serial hardware.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.TotalBetTimeSeconds
member.summary: Betting countdown seconds for this endpoint.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.CreateDefault
member.summary: Creates the default endpoint configuration.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.CreateDefaultForNumber(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates the default endpoint for the one-based UI row number.
member.returns: A PIT9 endpoint for the first four rows, otherwise a generated local endpoint.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.CreatePit9MoxaEndpoint(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a PIT9 MOXA TCP endpoint for the specified table.
member.returns: A physical MOXA TCP endpoint configuration.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.CreatePit9QaMoxaEndpoint
member.summary: Creates the PIT9 QA MOXA TCP endpoint.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.CreateMockSimulation(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a deterministic mock endpoint for local multi-shoe simulation.
member.returns: A mock endpoint configuration with stable BMS mapping values.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings.ApplyDefaultMapping(System.Int32)
member.summary: Applies deterministic BMS mapping fields for the endpoint number.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.Form1
member.summary: Main WinForms surface for configuring ANGEL shoe endpoints, testing local serial events, and posting events to BMS.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.Form1.#ctor
member.summary: Creates the bridge UI, loads persisted settings, and wires endpoint and API dispatch events.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.Form1.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases designer-created components used by the main form.
member.param: True when managed resources should be released.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BaccaratCard
member.summary: Represents one baccarat card currently displayed in the bridge preview panel.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BaccaratCard.Suit
member.summary: Card suit name.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BaccaratCard.Value
member.summary: Card rank value.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BaccaratCard.Index
member.summary: Draw index reported by the shoe.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BaccaratCard.IsPlayer
member.summary: True when the card belongs to the player side.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.PreviewStatusItem
member.summary: One status chip shown above the live baccarat preview.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.PreviewStatusItem.#ctor(System.String,System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: One status chip shown above the live baccarat preview.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.PreviewStatusItem.Text
member.summary: Status text.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.PreviewStatusItem.AccentColor
member.summary: Chip accent color.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BaccaratPreviewPanel
member.summary: Draws live baccarat cards, result banner, betting countdown, and shoe status chips.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BaccaratPreviewPanel.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a double-buffered baccarat preview panel.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.BaccaratPreviewPanel.OnPaint(System.Windows.Forms.PaintEventArgs)
member.summary: Paints the live preview panel.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ConnectionModeSettingsDialog
member.summary: Dialog used to edit the global physical shoe connection mode.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ConnectionModeSettingsDialog.SelectedConnectionMode
member.summary: Gets the selected global connection mode.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ConnectionModeSettingsDialog.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates the connection mode dialog.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.JwtSettingsDialog
member.summary: Dialog used to edit the source provider JWT settings stored by the bridge.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.JwtSettingsDialog.#ctor(AngelEyeBmsBridge.BridgeSettings)
member.summary: Creates a JWT settings dialog for the supplied bridge settings.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ToggleSwitch
member.summary: Simple owner-drawn toggle switch used by the WinForms bridge UI.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ToggleSwitch.#ctor
member.summary: Creates the toggle switch and enables owner-drawn double buffering.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ToggleSwitch.OnPaint(System.Windows.Forms.PaintEventArgs)
member.summary: Paints the toggle track, thumb, and optional label text.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.JwtTokenGenerator
member.summary: Generates HS256 JWT tokens that identify the ANGEL source provider when posting to BMS.

member.name: F:AngelEyeBmsBridge.JwtTokenGenerator.NameIdentifierClaim
member.summary: Claim type used by BMS as the source provider identifier.

member.name: F:AngelEyeBmsBridge.JwtTokenGenerator.SerialNumberClaim
member.summary: Claim type used by BMS as the source provider token serial number.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.JwtTokenGenerator.GenerateSourceProviderToken(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a signed source provider token using the bridge JWT settings.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.Program.Main
member.summary: The main entry point for the application.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener
member.summary: Reads, parses, and writes ANGEL EYE II-EX serial packets.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.IsMockMode
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the listener should run without a physical serial port.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.OnCardDrawn
member.summary: Raised when a card drawing event is parsed.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.OnGameResult
member.summary: Raised when a game result event is parsed.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.OnErrorOccurred
member.summary: Raised when a shoe error event is parsed.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.OnStatusChanged
member.summary: Raised when the listener status changes.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.OnRawDataLogged
member.summary: Raised for RX, RXRAW, TX, SIM, and SYS diagnostic log output.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.OnCommandAcknowledged
member.summary: Raised when a pending command receives ACK, NAK, timeout, or port-closed completion.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.OnLockStatusChanged
member.summary: Raised when the physical key lock status changes.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.OnErrorCleared
member.summary: Raised when the shoe reports an error cancellation event.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.OnCuttingCardDrawn
member.summary: Raised when the cutting card is drawn.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.SerialCommandResult
member.summary: Result of a command sent to the shoe.
member.param: True when ACK was received or simulated.
NAK error code when the shoe rejected the command.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.SerialCommandResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String)
member.summary: Result of a command sent to the shoe.
member.param: True when ACK was received or simulated.
NAK error code when the shoe rejected the command.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.SerialCommandResult.Succeeded
member.summary: True when ACK was received or simulated.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.SerialCommandResult.NakCode
member.summary: NAK error code when the shoe rejected the command.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.SerialCommandResult.Message
member.summary: Human-readable command result.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.CardInfo
member.summary: Parsed card draw or non-game card-state event.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.CardInfo.EventCode
member.summary: Raw event code, such as D, d, or R.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.CardInfo.Seq
member.summary: Protocol sequence counter.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.CardInfo.IsActiveGame
member.summary: True when the event was an active-game D event.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.CardInfo.Target
member.summary: Parsed target, such as Player, Banker, Burn, or LockMode.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.CardInfo.Index
member.summary: Draw sequence index from the protocol payload.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.CardInfo.Suit
member.summary: Parsed card suit.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.CardInfo.Value
member.summary: Parsed card rank.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.CardInfo.RawBytes
member.summary: Full raw packet rendered as hexadecimal text.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.GameResult
member.summary: Parsed baccarat result event.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.GameResult.Seq
member.summary: Protocol sequence counter.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.GameResult.Result
member.summary: Parsed winner value.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.GameResult.Pair
member.summary: Parsed pair value.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.GameResult.RawBytes
member.summary: Full raw packet rendered as hexadecimal text.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.ErrorInfo
member.summary: Parsed shoe error event.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.ErrorInfo.Seq
member.summary: Protocol sequence counter.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.ErrorInfo.InErrorMode
member.summary: True when the shoe is currently in error mode.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.ErrorInfo.ErrorCode
member.summary: System error code reported by the shoe.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.ErrorInfo.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Human-readable error description.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.ErrorInfo.RawBytes
member.summary: Full raw packet rendered as hexadecimal text.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.CutCardInfo
member.summary: Parsed cutting-card event.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.CutCardInfo.Seq
member.summary: Protocol sequence counter.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.CutCardInfo.RawBytes
member.summary: Full raw packet rendered as hexadecimal text.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.Open(System.String)
member.summary: Opens the configured serial port, or enters mock mode when enabled.
member.param: Serial port name, or MOCK when mock mode is enabled.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.OpenTcp(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Opens a direct TCP connection to a MOXA/NPort TCP server endpoint.
member.param: MOXA IP address or host name.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.Close
member.summary: Closes the serial/TCP connection and clears pending parser or command state.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.IsOpen
member.summary: Gets whether the listener is ready to receive data.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.InjectBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Injects bytes into the parser from either the real serial port or mock simulator.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.CalculateBcc(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Calculates the BCC used by inbound active report packets.
member.param: Packet bytes from ENQ or STX through ETX.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.SendRawCommand(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Sends raw bytes to the serial port without waiting for ACK or NAK.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.SendCommandAsync(System.Byte[],System.TimeSpan,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends command bytes and waits for ACK, NAK, timeout, or cancellation.
member.param: Maximum wait time for ACK or NAK.
Cancellation token for the wait operation.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.GetSystemErrorDescription(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the protocol-defined system error description.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.SerialListener.GetNakErrorDescription(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the protocol-defined NAK error description.

member.name: T:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint
member.summary: Coordinates one ANGEL shoe endpoint, including serial connection, local game numbering, preview state, and simulator events.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.#ctor(AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpointSettings)
member.summary: Creates an endpoint backed by the provided persistent settings.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.Settings
member.summary: Persistent settings used by this endpoint.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.Listener
member.summary: Serial protocol listener used by this endpoint.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.DeskId
member.summary: BMS system desk GUID.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.DeskName
member.summary: Human-readable desk name shown in the UI.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.SourceDataId
member.summary: BMS SourceData GUID.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.SourceDataCode
member.summary: BMS source table code.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ShoeId
member.summary: Bridge-side shoe device identifier.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.DeviceId
member.summary: Device identifier sent to BMS; currently matches .

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.CurrentShoe
member.summary: Current BMS shoe number.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.CurrentRound
member.summary: Current BMS round number.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.CurrentRoundId
member.summary: Current bridge round identifier, when a round exists.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ShoeRound
member.summary: Combined shoe and round display value.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ComPort
member.summary: Assigned local serial port.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ConnectionMode
member.summary: Physical connection mode for this endpoint.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.IsMoxaTcpMode
member.summary: Gets whether this endpoint connects directly to a MOXA/NPort TCP server.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.MoxaHost
member.summary: MOXA/NPort TCP server host or IP address.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.MoxaPort
member.summary: MOXA/NPort TCP server port.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ConnectionDisplay
member.summary: Human-readable connection endpoint shown in the UI and diagnostics.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ConnectionDisplayLabel
member.summary: Compact connection display label used by the live preview status strip.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.Enabled
member.summary: Whether this endpoint is enabled for connection and API posting.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.BmsTransmitEnabled
member.summary: Whether this endpoint should post its events to the BMS event API.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.MockMode
member.summary: Whether this endpoint uses the built-in simulator instead of a physical serial port.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.TotalBetTimeSeconds
member.summary: Betting countdown length for this endpoint.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.IsConnected
member.summary: Gets whether the endpoint is connected or in active mock mode.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.IsLocked
member.summary: Gets the last known key lock state, or null when unknown.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.InErrorMode
member.summary: Gets whether the shoe currently reports error mode.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ShoeEnding
member.summary: Gets whether the cutting card has been drawn and the shoe is ending.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ErrorCode
member.summary: Gets the last shoe error code, if any.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets the last shoe error message.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.StatusText
member.summary: Gets the current connection or command status text.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.LastEventAt
member.summary: Gets when the last endpoint event was observed.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.LastEventText
member.summary: Gets the last endpoint event summary.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.PlayerCards
member.summary: Player-side cards currently shown in the preview.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.BankerCards
member.summary: Banker-side cards currently shown in the preview.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.GameResultText
member.summary: Current result banner text.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.GameResultColor
member.summary: Current result banner color.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.BetCountdownStartedAtUtc
member.summary: UTC time when the current betting countdown started.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.BetCountdownSeconds
member.summary: Total seconds configured for the active betting countdown.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.BetCountdownRemainingSeconds
member.summary: Remaining seconds in the active betting countdown.

member.name: P:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.IsBetCountdownActive
member.summary: Gets whether the endpoint is still in a visible betting countdown state.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.StateChanged
member.summary: Raised when endpoint state changes and the UI should refresh.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.LogReceived
member.summary: Raised when endpoint diagnostics should be logged.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.CardDrawn
member.summary: Raised when a card or card-status event is parsed.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.GameResultReceived
member.summary: Raised when a game result is parsed.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ErrorOccurred
member.summary: Raised when the shoe reports an error.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.LockStatusChanged
member.summary: Raised when the key lock state changes.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ErrorCleared
member.summary: Raised when an error clear event is parsed.

member.name: E:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.CuttingCardDrawn
member.summary: Raised when the cutting card is drawn.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.Connect
member.summary: Connects the endpoint to its configured serial port or mock listener.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.Disconnect
member.summary: Disconnects the endpoint and closes the listener.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.SetLockAsync(System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a lock or unlock command to the shoe.
member.param: True to lock the shoe; false to unlock it.
Cancellation token for the command wait.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.CancelErrorAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends the error cancellation command to the shoe.
member.param: Two-digit error clear data from 00 through 99.
Cancellation token for the command wait.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ConfirmGameProcessAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends the game process confirmation command to the shoe.
member.param: Cancellation token for the command wait.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.SetGameNumber(System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Updates the local BMS shoe and round counters.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.StartNewShoe
member.summary: Advances to the next BMS shoe and resets round and preview state.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.InjectSimulatedEvent(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Injects a simulated ANGEL active report, including triple transmission behavior.
member.param: Payload bytes from event code through data bytes.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ClearPreview
member.summary: Clears visible cards, result banner, shoe-ending state, and betting countdown.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ResetMockTestState
member.summary: Resets simulator-only state without changing the configured shoe number.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.BeginNextRoundCountdown
member.summary: Starts the next local round and clears preview cards before the betting countdown.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.StartBetCountdown(System.DateTimeOffset,System.Int32)
member.summary: Starts the visible betting countdown for the current round.

member.name: M:AngelEyeBmsBridge.ShoeEndpoint.ClearBetCountdown
member.summary: Clears the visible betting countdown and notifies listeners.

member.name: T:ApplicationConfiguration
member.summary: Bootstrap the application configuration.

member.name: M:ApplicationConfiguration.Initialize
